summary: Ukrainian forces destroyed a Polish AHS Krab 155mm self-propelled howitzer in Kharkiv region using an optical fiber FPV drone "Provod." Russian forces repelled Ukrainian assaults on the Novopavlivka and Dobropillia directions, destroying enemy tanks with support from the National Guard's Lasar's Group NSU. On March 9, 2026, the Russian "Rubikon" Center reported 114 targets destroyed across multiple directions, including Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman, while conducting FPV air defense operations against Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs.
